name: Brain MRI T1 Pre-Contrast
description: Brain MRI T1-weighted pre-contrast sequence for anatomical evaluation

findings.technique: Multiplanar T1-weighted images were obtained before contrast administration.
findings.comparison: No prior MRI studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Parenchyma
sections.content: The cerebral parenchyma demonstrates [normal T1 signal intensity / no abnormal T1 hyperintensity / no mass or lesion].

sections.name: Ventricles
sections.content: The ventricular system is [normal in size / not dilated]. No effacement or mass effect.

sections.name: Midline Structures
sections.content: Midline structures are [midline / centered]. No shift or herniation.

sections.name: Cisterns and Sulci
sections.content: The basal cisterns are [patent / open]. Cortical sulci are [normal in appearance / not prominent].

impression:
1. Normal pre-contrast T1 study.
2. No abnormal T1 signal abnormality identified.
